h1: PCB Design Layout Guidelines for Routing

headings.text: PCB Design Layout Guidelines for Routing

sections.heading: PCB Design Layout Guidelines for Routing
sections.text: Blog > PCB Design Layout Guidelines for Routing PCB Design Layout Guidelines for Routing by: Mia Jul 17,2024 24532 Views 3 Comments Posted in PCB Design & Layout PCB Design Guideline PCB Routing PCB Layout 1. Length Control in Routing Length controlling is very important in PCB design. The traces should be kept as short as possible to avoid introducing unnecessary interference due to excessive length. For important signal traces, such as clock signal traces, be sure to place its oscillator very close to the device. 2. Direction Control in Routing The routing directions of adjacent layers should be orthogonal to avoid the signal traces of adjacent layers running in the same direction, thus r...
